name: Ollie
summary: The foundational trick of skateboarding. The rider pops the tail of the board while sliding their front foot up to jump into the air with the board.

name: Shuv It
summary: The board rotates 180 degrees under the rider's feet without popping off the ground. The rider jumps slightly forward to catch it.

name: Pop Shuv It
summary: A combination of an Ollie and a Shuv It. The tail is snapped against the ground to get airtime while the back foot scoops the board 180 degrees.

name: HeelFlip
summary: An ollie where the rider flicks their front foot out to the side, causing the board to spin 360 degrees along its longitudinal axis before landing.

name: Kickflip
summary: An ollie where the rider flicks their front foot out to the side, causing the board to spin 360 degrees along its longitudinal axis before landing.
